penalties.description: No actual task performance visible - only static display of instruments and materials without any suturing activity.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: The video shows only a static display of surgical instruments laid out on a red surface, including what appears to be a knot pusher, various instruments, and a blue cylindrical object. No actual task performance is visible - there is no suturing activity, no Penrose drain with marked targets, no suture material being manipulated, and no timing markers for start or completion. This appears to be an equipment demonstration or setup video rather than a task performance that can be scored according to FLS criteria.
